headline: Norwegian Luna Delivery Puts Capacity Growth And Profitability In Focus
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings has taken delivery of Norwegian Luna, the second ship in its Prima Plus Class. Luna is a larger vessel than earlier Prima Class ships and is positioned to expand capacity and refresh the guest experience. The delivery follows recent leadership changes and board pressures and marks a material operational development for NYSE:NCLH. For investors tracking NYSE:NCLH, Luna’s arrival lands at a time when the stock trades around $20.35 and shows a mixed return...

headline: These Cruise Line Stocks Are Falling Amid War-Driven Volatility
summary: Cruise lines face rising fuel costs and potentially softer demand due to the Middle East war.

headline: Oceania Cruises® Unveils The Joy of Traveling Well, A New Global Campaign Celebrating Modern Luxury and Intentional Travel
summary: Oceania Cruises®, the world's leading culinary- and destination-focused luxury cruise line, today introduced The Joy of Traveling Well - a new global campaign and evolved brand expression that reflects the company's continued commitment to intentional, enriching travel at sea.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Avoid
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Trump reiterates threat of a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba as fuel crisis deepens
summary: The comments come less than a week after Trump suggested that his administration would turn its sights on Havana.

headline: From Red to Green: How Trump's Iran Endgame Sparked a Wall Street Comeback
summary: Oil crashed 30% in a single session. Stagflation fears evaporated in real time. And a handful of company-specific stories made Monday one of the more memorable trading days of the year, for reasons both dramatic and surprisingly bullish.
